typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveFile as string (),
	ArchiveFolder as string (),
	ClientEmailTemplate as string (),
	DropFolder as string (),
	FileNameWithoutPath as string (),
	HasErrored as boolean (),
	ImportFileId as integer (),
	ImportRunId as integer (),
	IsFileInvalid as boolean (),
	IsFileNameValid as boolean (),
	OriginalFile as string (),
	ProcessingFile as string (),
	ProcessingFolder as string (),
	ReceptionFile as string (),
	ReceptionFolder as string (),
	RowDelimiter as string (),
	SupportEmailTemplate as string (),
	Cfg_BaseDirectory as string (),
	Cfg_RowDelimiter as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Column 0} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource split(left(Column_0, 6) != 'HEADER' && left(Column_0, 7) != 'TRAILER', disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(DataRow,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@DataRow derive({Column 1} = replace(replace(Column_0, toString('|'), toString(',')), toString(' '), toString(''))) ~> ReplacePipesandSpaces
ReplacePipesandSpaces derive({Column 1} = left(Column_1, length(Column_1) - 1)) ~> TrimLastPipe
TrimLastPipe sink(input(
		Column_1 as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Column_1 = {Column 1})) ~> FlatFileDestination
